competitors.name: Cursor
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Cursor 3.5 (May 20 2026): Cloud Agents — agents run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, browser, and desktop access, work across multiple repos in parallel, report results back to IDE asynchronously. Cursor 3.3 (May 7): Build in Parallel subagents, pinned-skill pills, Composer 2.5 multi-file refactor at file-tree scale, native Jira integration. Cursor 3.2 (April 24): /multitask lets agent execution runtime spawn async subagents in parallel rather than serializing requests in a queue. Multi-root workspaces: single agent session targets multiple repos for cross-repository changes. June 2026 Enterprise GA: manage multiple Cursor teams from one place, security/governance/budget controls per team. Automations in Agents Window, attach multiple repos to automation so agents reason across all required context and work across repos to deliver, test, and verify tasks. /loop skill for local long-running agents.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Cursor 3.5 (May 20 2026): Cloud Agents — agents run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, brows

changes.description: Cursor 3.5 Cloud Agents：在隔离云 VM 中运行，跨多 repo 并行，异步返回结果到 IDE
changes.evidence: 「agents that run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, browser, and desktop access, can work across multiple repos in parallel」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI=快 session 在云端独立运行；锚点 #4：跨 repo artifact pull

changes.description: Cursor 3.2 /multitask：agent 执行运行时生成异步子 agent 并行，不再串行排队
changes.evidence: 「lets Cursor's agent execution runtime spawn async subagents in parallel rather than serializing requests in a queue」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：多个 AI fast session 并行，IDE 成为 agent 执行运行时

changes.description: Automations 支持挂载多个 repo，agent 跨 repo 推理、执行、测试、验证任务
changes.evidence: 「attach multiple repos to an automation so agents reason across all required context and work across repos to deliver, test, and verify tasks」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨 repo artifact pull；锚点 #1：session 跨边界持续运行

key_findings: Cursor 3.5 Cloud Agents 让 AI 在云端独立运行、跨 repo 并行 — IDE 正式转型为 agent 执行运行时
3.2 /multitask + multi-root workspaces：单个 agent session 可跨多 repo — 与 meee2 跨工具 artifact pull 锚点直接重叠
June 2026 企业版：Automations 进驻 Agents Window，/loop 支持长周期 agent —— session 调度层成形

competitors.name: OpenAI / ChatGPT
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Workspace Agents (2026): teams create shared agents handling complex tasks and long-running workflows, operating within org permissions, powered by Codex. Tasks: preparing reports, writing code, responding to messages. Run in the cloud so they can keep working even when you're not. Free period extended until July 6 2026. Upcoming: new triggers that start work automatically, better dashboards, more ways for agents to take action across business tools, support for workspace agents in Codex app. Canvas: no longer available in GPT-5.5 Instant or GPT-5.5 Thinking; writing/coding functionality now supported directly in chat via writing blocks and code blocks. Projects (Team): 40 uploaded files, up from 20. Projects available for Plus, Pro, and Team.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Workspace Agents (2026): teams create shared agents handling complex tasks and long-running workflows,

changes.description: Workspace Agents：团队共享 agent 在云端处理长期工作流，用户不在场时继续运行
changes.evidence: 「run in the cloud so they can keep working even when you're not」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI=快 session，在云端独立运行，人不在场时持续工作 — 与 meee2 session 同构协议高度重叠

changes.description: 即将支持新触发器自动启动工作，跨业务工具 action，Codex app 支持
changes.evidence: 「new triggers that can start work automatically, more ways for agents to take action across business tools」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：event-triggered session；锚点 #4：跨工具 action

changes.description: Canvas 在 GPT-5.5 新模型中废弃，写作/代码融入聊天流 — 从 canvas artifact 范式退步
changes.evidence: 「Canvas will no longer be available in GPT-5.5 Instant or GPT-5.5 Thinking, with writing and coding functionality now supported directly in chat responses」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：Canvas 弱化意味着 OpenAI 放弃 artifact live link 范式，该方向威胁降低

key_findings: Workspace Agents 正式上线：团队共享 agent 在云端自主运行，不依赖用户在线 — 直接触碰 meee2 锚点 #1
Canvas 在 GPT-5.5 系列中废弃：OpenAI 将 artifact 范式折叠入聊天流，与 meee2 路线分叉

competitors.name: Windsurf (Codeium)
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Windsurf rebranded to Devin Desktop; windsurf.com/changelog redirects to Devin Docs. Agent Command Center introduced: managing all agents in one place, including Spaces, Kanban view, multi-agent management. Cascade Wave 13: improved memory system remembers codebase structure across conversations, enhanced multi-model routing, Supercomplete accuracy boost, MCP tool support (Supabase, Notion, GitHub). Devin Cloud Integration: autonomous cloud agent built directly into Windsurf that spins up its own machine in the cloud and works autonomously on complex tasks like debugging, testing, and deployment. Persistent Memory: Cascade remembers coding patterns, project structure, preferred frameworks across sessions — AI gets smarter over time.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Windsurf rebranded to Devin Desktop; windsurf.com/changelog redirects to Devin Docs. Agent Command Ce

Devin Cloud 内建 IDE：自主云端 agent 直接嵌入开发环境，人（慢）在 IDE，AI（快）在云端
Agent Command Center + Kanban view：agent session 管理面板化，首次出现类 board 视图

competitors.name: Claude.ai / Anthropic
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Artifacts (April 2026, all paid plans + inside Projects): persistent storage across sessions, can call Claude's API directly (AI runs inside artifact), MCP integration with Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack. Routines (research preview): scheduled automations running on Claude Code's cloud infrastructure even when laptop is off. Cowork: desktop agent reads and writes to actual files, executes multi-step tasks autonomously, delivers finished work to folder. Managed Agents: sandbox + private MCP server connectivity for enterprise. Claude Opus 4.8: improvements in coding, agentic skills, reasoning. Claude Sonnet 4.6: 1M context window, 30-50% faster than 4.5, Feb 17 2026. Code with Claude: Managed Agents, Proactive Workflows announced.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Artifacts (April 2026, all paid plans + inside Projects): persistent storage across sessions, can call Cl

changes.evidence: 「scheduled automations running on Claude Code's cloud infrastructure even when your laptop is off」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI=快 session 完全自主运行，不依赖人的在场 — 与 meee2 Routine 范式直接同构

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Copilot App (Microsoft Build 2026): dedicated desktop application replacing scattered chat windows, unified 'My Work' view consolidating active agent sessions, issues, PRs, background automations across connected repos. Copilot Workspace GA: reasons across entire repo, proposes multi-file edits, runs tests, iterates autonomously. Autopilot mode: schedules autonomous operation on background tasks — Copilot acts on bounded issue without developer present. /every: schedules recurring prompts and background tasks. Cloud automations: agents run on schedule, respond to GitHub events, open issues, leave comments. Autonomous Agent Mode (July 2026, Enterprise): write, test, commit entire feature branches; requires human approval before merge. Fleet mode CLI: autonomous narrowly-defined codebase tasks without per-step confirmation. Project Polaris replaces GPT-4. Multi-Agent VS Code at Build.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Copilot App (Microsoft Build 2026): dedicated desktop application replacing scattered chat windows, uni

changes.evidence: 「unified 'My Work' view, consolidating active agent sessions, associated issues, pull requests, and background automations across connected repositories」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：统一 agent session 管理面板；锚点 #5：专用桌面客户端进入 peripheral 层

changes.description: Autopilot 模式 + /every 定时任务：无需开发者在场的后台自主 agent 操作
changes.evidence: 「Autopilot mode schedules autonomous operation on background tasks — Copilot acts on a bounded issue without a developer present」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI=快 session 完全自主，/every 对应 session 调度层

changes.description: Autonomous Agent Mode（7月 Enterprise 上线）：自动写、测试、提交整个功能分支
changes.evidence: 「write, test, and commit entire feature branches, though every autonomous change still requires human approval before merging」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI fast session 自主完成完整工作单元（功能分支），人=审批节点

key_findings: Copilot App（Build 2026）：专用桌面 app 统一 agent session 管理 — 从上次报告的「控制平面」到真正的专用桌面客户端，战略意图明确
Autopilot + /every + Cloud Automations：GitHub 正在构建完整 AI session 调度层，覆盖后台/定时/事件驱动
Project Polaris 替换 GPT-4 + Multi-Agent VS Code：底层模型升级 + 并行 agent 架构同步推进

competitors.name: Google Gemini / AI Studio
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Agent Designer (preview): visual flow canvas for building agent workflows. Canvas: interactive editor for co-creation in Google Docs/Slides, Microsoft 365 interoperability. Workspace APIs: agents natively call Google Workspace APIs (Calendar, Docs, Slides from canvas mode). AI Studio (I/O 2026): native Android vibe coding, Workspace integrations, mobile app, Antigravity one-click local-to-production. Agent Engine Sessions and Memory Bank (GA): give agents persistent context across interactions. Agent Garden: prebuilt agent solutions (customer service, data analysis, creative tasks). A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol announced at Google Cloud Next. Gemini Enterprise: one platform for agent development.
competitors.content_hash:

Agent Designer (preview): visual flow canvas for building agent workflows. Canvas: interactive editor for

changes.description: Agent Engine Sessions + Memory Bank（GA）：跨交互持久上下文，session 级记忆规模化可用
changes.evidence: 「Agent Engine Sessions and Memory Bank, which give agents persistent context across interactions, are generally available」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI session 跨对话保持状态，GA 意味着企业可规模部署持久 session

Agent Engine Sessions GA：持久 session 上下文规模化可用 — 大厂验证 session 持久性是核心企业需求

competitors.name: Linear
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Linear Agent public beta (March 2026): Skills, Automations, Code Intelligence on all plans (Automations+Code Intelligence on Business/Enterprise). Skills: save reusable workflows from conversations. Automations: trigger agent workflows when issues enter triage. Code Intelligence (May 14 2026): agent has controlled access to codebase, turning repositories into shared product context your whole team can use, agent reasons about how product actually works not just issue text. MCP Support (April 23 2026): connect to external tools via MCP (data + actions beyond Linear workspace). Linear Diffs (May 27 2026): review diffs from any issue with PR, iterate on further changes with agents, ship code from Linear. Linear Releases: CI/CD integration, auto-update issue statuses when code lands in production.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Linear Agent public beta (March 2026): Skills, Automations, Code Intelligence on all plans (Automations+C

competitors.name: Notion AI
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Developer Platform (May 13 2026): extends custom AI agents, connects with external agents, allows teams to build automated multistep workflows pulling from any database. Notion Workers: hosted runtime for custom code, runs in secure sandbox, billed on Notion credits from Aug 11 2026. Custom Agents (Feb 24 2026): AI teammates for FAQ, status updates, workflow automation — 1 million agents built by customers since launch. MCP connectors: Linear, Figma, HubSpot, Slack, GitHub, Intercom, Amplitude, Attio, Sentry, Ramp, Wiz, Stripe. Agents can now read and reply in private Slack channels. Database sync with any API powered by Workers. Agent management: control who can create agents, individual or group permissions, spend limits.

competitors.name: Slack
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

AI Generate Step (GA): generative AI native workflow step, select knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists), LLM generates response in workflow (summarize, translate, draft). Slackbot rebuilt (GA for Business+/Enterprise+): fully powered AI agent, searches enterprise data, drafts documents, takes action on behalf of employees, has full native context of where users are and what they're working on. Developer platform: single slack create agent command, Bolt framework, BYOLLM (Claude SDK, OpenAI SDK, Pydantic AI). Open source Starter Agent + Support Agent sample apps. Block Kit updates: cards, alerts, carousel, code/data tables for agent UIs.

competitors.name: Raycast
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Agents (renamed from Presets): reused across chats, updates propagate to all chats using that agent. Memory: chats remember context about you, feel more personal. Skills: custom instructions/knowledge for recurring tasks. Skills + AI Extensions dynamically loaded when relevant (no manual mention needed). Raycast 2.0 public beta (May 14 2026): Windows support for first time. AI Dictation: dictate text directly through Raycast across any app — system-wide, not just inside Raycast window. Quick Fix: fix spelling/grammar, paste corrected text. Branching (CMD+Shift+B): create branched chats. MCP HTTP Servers support (SSE + Streamable). GitHub Copilot integration: assign issues to Copilot from Raycast.

competitors.name: Replit
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Agent 4: parallel sub-agents for auth, DB, backend, frontend simultaneously. Multi-agent: large tasks auto-broken into concurrent forks, dedicated sub-agents merge results and resolve conflicts. Collaborative: multiple team members submit requests simultaneously, agent sequences/executes in optimal order. Shared session: teammates work in own chat threads OR collaborate in shared session alongside agent. Background task execution: track status, review, approve before merge into main project. 'Fully integrated productivity suite': canvas, apps, sites, slides, videos. Cross-tool integrations: create Linear tickets, answer Notion questions, analyze Excel. Production-ready software 10x faster.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Agent 4: parallel sub-agents for auth, DB, backend, frontend simultaneously. Multi-agent: large tasks auto

changes.description: Agent 4 shared session：多团队成员可在同一 session 内与 agent 协作
changes.evidence: 「Teammates can work in their own chat threads or collaborate in a shared session alongside the agent」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：多人（慢）+ agent（快）在同一 session 内协同 — 与 meee2「人在 agent 图内」范式高度相似，但范围局限于 coding 场景

changes.description: 并行子 agent + 冲突解决：大任务自动拆分为并发 fork，专用 sub-agent 合并冲突
changes.evidence: 「Agent 4 automatically breaks them into smaller forks, runs them concurrently using sub-agents, and merges the results, resolving any conflicts with dedicated sub-agents」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：multi-agent 并行 session 编排，技术架构与 meee2 概念有重叠但不直接竞争

key_findings: Agent 4 shared session：多人+AI 在同一 session 协作，与 meee2「人在 agent 图内」范式相近
Replit 声称成为「全栈生产力套件」：canvas、apps、slides、跨 Linear/Notion/Excel 数据操作

competitors.name: Superwhisper
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Claude Code, OpenCode, Amp integrations (v2.13.0, April 2026, macOS only). Codex hook support (May 2026). CSV vocabulary bulk-import (May 2026). Gemini + Grok cloud AI model support. GPT 5.1 + Opus 4.5 support. Redesigned UI: new history, full text search, segmented playback, fast load, multi-select delete, upgraded model library. Real-time streaming UI with live transcription, faster Parakeet, British English spelling. Recording retention settings. Input device auto-select. Lower volume recording option.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Claude Code, OpenCode, Amp integrations (v2.13.0, April 2026, macOS only). Codex hook support (May 2026).

changes.description: Claude Code、OpenCode、Amp、Codex hook 官方集成：语音输入直通 coding agent 工作流
changes.evidence: 「official integrations for Claude Code, OpenCode, and Amp, plus Codex hook support added in May 2026」
changes.meee2_relevance: peripheral 工具链整合加速，语音→agent 输入层成形，但无结构性 session 协议变化

key_findings: 与主要 coding agent（Claude Code、Amp、Codex）完成官方对接，成为标准语音输入层

alerts.headline: Cursor 3.5 Cloud Agents：AI 在隔离云 VM 跨 repo 并行运行，IDE 成为 agent 执行运行时
alerts.evidence: 「agents that run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, browser, and desktop access, can work across multiple repos in parallel」
alerts.action_suggestion: 重点关注 Cloud Agent 的 session 生命周期设计 — 是否引入 session ID、人对 agent 的委托协议。若是，meee2 需加速「session 委托协议」的可见性差异化：session 不仅是后台运行，而是图内节点

alerts.headline: Workspace Agents 上线：团队共享 agent 在云端自主运行，用户不在场时持续工作
alerts.evidence: 「run in the cloud so they can keep working even when you're not」
alerts.action_suggestion: OpenAI Workspace Agents 与 meee2 锚点 #1 高度重叠，但缺少「人在 agent 图内」的协同层。meee2 应在营销上强调 session 协同而非仅自动化，突出人-AI 同图协议是差异化护城河

alerts.headline: Windsurf 品牌迁移为 Devin Desktop，IDE 与自主云端 AI 工程师完全融合
alerts.evidence: 「Devin Desktop is the new name for Windsurf...autonomous cloud agent built directly into Windsurf that spins up its own machine in the cloud」
alerts.action_suggestion: Windsurf→Devin 的融合标志着「IDE = AI agent 入口」范式已被大厂验证。meee2 需明确：不是另一个 Devin 入口，而是跨工具（跨 IDE、跨通信、跨项目管理）的 session 协议层

alerts.headline: Routines + Cowork：Anthropic 官方构建定时 AI session 调度器 + 桌面 agent，直接触碰 meee2 锚点 #1 和 #5
alerts.evidence: 「scheduled automations running on Claude Code's cloud infrastructure even when your laptop is off」
alerts.action_suggestion: meee2 本身运行在 Claude Code Routine 上 — 需关注 Routines 正式 GA 后是否向第三方开放，以及 Cowork 是否覆盖菜单栏场景。短期差异化：meee2 的跨工具 live link 和 session 图内协同是 Routines 目前不具备的

alerts.headline: Copilot App + Autopilot 模式：专用桌面客户端统一 agent session 管理，含定时后台任务
alerts.evidence: 「unified 'My Work' view, consolidating active agent sessions, associated issues, pull requests, and background automations across connected repositories」
alerts.action_suggestion: Copilot App 的 My Work 视图是 meee2 session board 的直接竞品概念。需跟进 7月 Autonomous Agent Mode Enterprise 上线后的 session 协议设计 — 若引入人+AI 并列同一 board，威胁等级应升为 crit

alerts.headline: A2A 协议 + Agent Engine Sessions GA：Google 在定义跨 agent 通信标准和持久 session 层
alerts.evidence: 「Agent Engine Sessions and Memory Bank, which give agents persistent context across interactions, are generally available」
alerts.action_suggestion: A2A 协议是 Google 推进 agent-to-agent 通信标准化，若被业界采用可能成为行业标准。meee2 需关注 A2A 规范，评估其 session 模型与 meee2「人+AI 同协议」的兼容性或差异化空间

alerts.headline: Code Intelligence：Linear agent 获得 codebase 访问权，项目管理层直接触碰 coding context
alerts.evidence: 「turning repositories into shared product context your whole team can use, allowing the agent to reason about how your product actually works」
alerts.action_suggestion: Linear 正在成为 project management + codebase context 融合层，与 meee2 跨工具 artifact pull（锚点 #4）方向相同。重点关注 Linear Diffs 是否演化为人+AI 共同 review 的 session 协议
